name: Crunchy Beans with Turnips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a 4 x 8 baking pan with soy oil.
3. Steam the turnips until tender.
4. In a blender, combine lima beans, chives, curry, soy sauce, salt, and soy oil with 2 ounces of water.
5. Puree until smooth.
6. Combine all ingredients together and mix well.
7. Transfer to the baking pan and cook for 15 minutes.
